title: デモ: はじめてのタスク管理
global_art_prompt: black and white Japanese manga, modern office slice-of-life, clean professional manga page, crisp ink lines, screentone shading, expressive faces, clear hands, clean panel borders, right-to-left manga reading flow, render all specified Japanese dialogue exactly as written, readable Japanese manga typesetting, consistent character designs

characters.hana: Hana Suzuki, Japanese woman in her late 20s, short bob hair, round glasses, casual cardigan over blouse. Quiet, thoughtful, slightly anxious when overwhelmed. Only Hana wears glasses.
characters.taro: Taro Yamada, Japanese man in his 30s, tall, short black hair, friendly smile, open-collar shirt. Supportive colleague, no glasses.

quality_checks: No app logos or real brand names except the fictional product name in the final panel

pages.title: フック: 散らかったデスク

panels.art: Large top hook panel. Hana sits at a cluttered desk covered in sticky notes and open browser tabs on her monitor. She rubs her temples, glasses visible, exhausted expression.

dialogue.text: また締め切りに追われてる

panels.art: Close-up of Hana's monitor showing a chaotic to-do list. Her hand hovers over the mouse, hesitant.
Taro leans into the frame from the corridor doorway, holding two coffee cups, cheerful expression.
Large bottom panel. Hana looks up at Taro with a tired but grateful smile. Coffee steam rises between them.

pages.title: 転換: 新しいツール

panels.art: Over-the-shoulder shot. Hana looks at her laptop screen from behind. The screen shows a clean task board interface with the text 'TaskFlow'. Only the screen content is visible, not her face.
Hana's face in close-up, eyes widening behind glasses, a spark of hope.
Wide shot of the office. Hana and Taro sit side by side at the desk, both looking at the screen. Warm afternoon light.
Large bottom panel. Hana smiles genuinely for the first time, pushing her glasses up. Clean desk in the background.

dialogue.speaker: はな
dialogue.text: 明日から、ちゃんと進められそう
